subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath spoken forth proclaiming His Own Oneness, and hath caused all things to speak in remembrance and praise of Him, and Who through His attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نطق بتوحید ذاته و انطق الاشیاء بذکره و ثنائه و مع انه وصف
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
